title: alnus dolichocarpa
intro: Alnus dolichocarpa, also known as mountain alder or Japanese alder, is a species of flowering plant in the alder family (Betulaceae) that is native to Japan and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alnus dolichocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb for addressing various health concerns. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
